steps.title: Set up the percentage equation
steps.content:
We know that 80% of items are faulty and there are 88 faulty items. This relationship is:

$$0.80 \times \text{Total} = 88$$

steps.title: Solve for total items
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 0.80:

$$\text{Total} = \frac{88}{0.80} = \frac{88}{\frac{4}{5}} = 88 \times \frac{5}{4} = \frac{440}{4} = 110$$

The sample contains 110 total items.
